original: a two-handed combat spear that once belonged to a nyrean Queen
context: <<POS:06234693>> e.description='a two-handed combat spear that once belonged to a nyrean Que'

original: A two-handed spear once carried by Queen Taivra herself.\n\nThe length of the shaft is wrapped in tight bindings- the same material the Nyrean hunting nets are made of- from tip to tail, obscuring the underlying structure, but making for superior grip. The business end is tipped with a marvelous blade of unfamiliar metal, the edges razor sharp.
context: <<POS:06234768>> e.tooltip='A two-handed spear once carried by Queen Taivra herself.\\n\\n'
